content.speakerText: You mentioned you led a team project—what was your biggest challenge?
content.speakerTextCn: 你提到带过团队项目，最大的挑战是什么？
expectedAnswers: Getting everyone aligned was hard, so I started daily stand-ups and it improved transparency.
Communication gaps were causing delays—I introduced a shared project board and it made a big difference.
It was balancing deadlines with team well-being—I learned to delegate more effectively.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确指出具体挑战
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否使用过去时态
表达自然度：是否像母语者自然表达，避免机械背诵
关键词覆盖：是否包含 challenge, solution, result 或类似表达

content.speakerText: How did that experience make you better at your job?
content.speakerTextCn: 这段经历让你在工作中变得更好了吗？
expectedAnswers: I became more proactive—I now flag risks before they become problems.
I stopped waiting for instructions and started taking initiative based on data.
It taught me the value of feedback—I now ask for it regularly from peers.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否强调行为或思维模式的改变，而非结果或奖励
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的动词时态（现在时描述当前习惯）
表达自然度：是否使用口语化但专业的表达（如 'flag risks', 'take initiative'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'became', 'started', 'learned', 'now' 等体现成长的词
